usageFrame.buildNote: R6 detach gotcha: awaits AFTER detachInstance() invalidate detached-frame child refs (re-IDed next microtask). Fix: pre-build body content BEFORE detach, assemble with NO awaits after detach, then title/footer overrides in a separate settled call. Chained .createInstance().detachInstance() returned a stale frame — split into 2 statements. Radio set id changed (installer rebuild): old 687:19770 deleted -> new 821:14340.

modalSet.name: Modal
modalSet.size: 2540x1944 (per-size W×H; repacked). R6: MOVED to test page (302:19291) at x=0,y=0 (out of installer's reach).

Body.boundIn: all 8 variants (body text layer). Body consolidated from 2 text nodes to 1 (multi-line via \n).

componentProperties_R7.footerButtonLabels: NOT exposed as Modal property — local Button (687:19532) has no label TEXT property and its label is inside a nested INSTANCE (Figma disallows binding a component property across instance boundaries). Users can still edit labels by double-clicking into the button (deep edit). See needsDecision.
componentProperties_R7.note: R7: shell 'edit text only' model. Users edit Title/Body in the Instance properties panel without breaking structure. Runtime setProperties(TEXT) is font-blocked (Pretendard not installed in MCP), but works in Figma Desktop where Pretendard is installed.

bindings.fill: color/modal/bg (NEW semantic 809:2; Light #FFFFFF / Dark #1C1D23 — replaced color/bg/level-0)
bindings.structure_R5: Each variant = [Content (VERTICAL autolayout: Header + Body, gap spacing/32)] + [Footer], with frame primaryAxisAlignItems=SPACE_BETWEEN. So when content < minHeight: Content group top, Footer bottom, slack between (body NOT stretched — snaps to content). When content > minHeight: frame hugs, gap = spacing/32. Verified footer gapToBottom=20 (=paddingBottom) all sizes; Body height=34 (2 lines, snapped).
bindings.itemSpacing: spacing/32 (SPACE_BETWEEN min gap Content<->Footer; Content internal Header<->Body gap also spacing/32)
bindings.minHeight: R5 per-size: S=174, M=336, L=587, XL=587. primaryAxisSizingMode=AUTO (hug above floor). counterAxisSizingMode=FIXED (per-size width).
bindings.bodyLayoutGrow: Body layoutGrow=0 + layoutSizingVertical=HUG (body hugs content, does NOT pre-occupy space — footer-at-bottom achieved via SPACE_BETWEEN + Content group, not body fill).
bindings.title: text style LOCAL title/16B (Pretendard Bold 16) + fill color/text/title/primary. R1 canonical remote Title/16B rebind BLOCKED (see needsDecision).
bindings.body: text style LOCAL body/14R (Pretendard Regular 14) + fill color/text/body/primary. R1 canonical remote Body/14R rebind BLOCKED (see needsDecision).
bindings.footerButtons: local Button instances Size=XSM State=Default Variant=Primary/Secondary

structureNotes: combineAsVariants of 8 components (Size 4 x Footer 2). Set packed into 4x2 grid (rows S/M/L/XL, cols Dual/Single), set resized to 2540x916 (no coordinate-spread collapse).

Footer buttons are instances of local Button set 687:19532 (Size=XSM=h34). Labels overridden via nested-text override (취소/확인). Button layer names remain '버튼' (harmless; only characters+fontName matter).
Close icon = imported ic_닫기 component SET (593:33518), Line variant instance, visible solid paints rebound to color/icon/gray-dark.
No sibling-variant nesting -> no circular reference. Usage/Spec instances reference Modal set variants (parent contains child instances) — not circular.

Placement (after R4 reflow): all 3 outputs stacked at x=0 (Platform column), below existing sections (max bottom 4452). Set y=4652 (h1044), Usage y=5896 (h1853), Spec Dark y=7949 (h833). 200px gaps, no overlap.

R1 changes: (2) header<->body<->footer itemSpacing 16->32 (spacing/32, 8:929) on all 8 variants; (3) minHeight 184 on all 8 variants (+detached Ex3/Ex4); (4) Spec Dark panels -> subtle border + 2 ref shadows (light flat, untouched); (5) button instances forced Dark mode (were pinned Light). (1) canonical remote Title/Body style rebind BLOCKED by runtime Pretendard unavailability (see needsDecision).

R2 changes (user decision): created NEW semantic color/modal/bg (809:2, Light base/white / Dark gray-dark/100, alias-only). Rebound ALL modal panels (8 main variant component defs + 2 detached Ex3/Ex4 + 3 Spec Dark instances) fill to color/modal/bg, replacing color/bg/level-0 (main) and removing foundation-direct gray-dark/100 override (Spec Dark). Resolved: Light #FFFFFF, Dark #1C1D23. stroke/effects unchanged. Zero raw hex (all foundation/variable alias).
R3 changes (per-size minHeight + body layoutGrow fill) were REVERTED in R4 — kept here only for history.

R4 changes (user correction, ref 6706:4219 pure hug): removed ALL minHeight (null) and set Body layoutGrow=0 + layoutSizingVertical=HUG on 8 variants + 2 detached. Height now = pure content hug (title+body+footer). Result: 8 main variants all 196 (width-only differs; L/XL NOT forced to 587), detached Ex3=237, Ex4=422 (map placeholder drives it). Footer in hug stack directly below body (no bottom-pin). Repacked set -> 2540x1044; Usage y=5896 (h1853), Spec Dark y=7949 (h833), 200px gaps no overlap. Zero raw hex (panels bound color/modal/bg 809:2). NOTE: fixing layoutGrow alone left Body height stuck (FILL) -> also required Body layoutSizingVertical=HUG to collapse.

Ex3/Ex4 usage examples DETACHED from Modal instance because Figma instances cannot accept new nested children (needed to inject radios/map/table). Footer buttons in those 2 examples are detached copies, not Button instances. Main Modal set + Ex1/Ex2 keep real Button instances.

All 19 required variables existed locally by name — zero raw-hex fallback. All fills/strokes bound to Variables; all text bound to Pretendard text styles (data-scan verified: title/16B, body/14R, body/14M, all Pretendard).

R5 changes (user FINAL sizes): per-size W×H = S 360×174 / M 520×336 (width 440→520) / L 1000×587 / XL 1200×587. NEW STRUCTURE (per coordinator, NOT R3 body-fill): each variant reorganized into [Content group (Header+Body, VERTICAL gap spacing/32)] + [Footer] with frame primaryAxisAlignItems=SPACE_BETWEEN + per-size minHeight. Footer pinned to bottom; Body snapped (layoutGrow=0, HUG) — verified gapToBottom=20, bodyH=34 all sizes. Set repacked -> 2540×1944.

R8 fix (alignment regression): 3 variants (763:9029, 763:6135, 763:9057) had regressed to primaryAxisAlignItems=MIN (content+footer pulled up, empty space below footer = user's '푸터가 올라감'). Reset ALL 8 variants to SPACE_BETWEEN (primaryAxisSizingMode=AUTO + per-size minHeight kept). Verified footer gapToBottom=20 all sizes incl L/XL 587. INSTANCE TEST: createInstance(L/Dual 763:6135) -> instance footer gapToBottom=20, align SPACE_BETWEEN (user's 'clicked component=instance, footer up' reproduced-then-resolved); test instance deleted. 0 raw hex, 0 non-Pretendard.
needsDecision: R1 item1 BLOCKED (environment): canonical CAPITAL 'Title/16B' (S:023fa21970a45e112b93260bcea80e2f30923e61,1415:4) & 'Body/14R' (S:a104b2f07030a8cf4961b54707c97ef6f06d150d,1415:27) are REMOTE library text styles. Binding them (setTextStyleIdAsync AND sync textStyleId setter both) requires loading the target Pretendard font, which is NOT installed in the MCP/plugin runtime (loadFontAsync 'Pretendard' fails: family does not exist; importStyleByKeyAsync also fails: key not found). Local lowercase title/16B (Pretendard Bold 16) / body/14R (Pretendard Regular 14) are VISUALLY IDENTICAL and remain bound. Options: (a) user rebinds in Figma Desktop where Pretendard is installed — select modal title/body texts, apply canonical style (1-click); (b) localize/publish the canonical styles into this file; (c) accept local equivalents. Cannot be done from this runtime.

RESOLVED (R2, user decision): dedicated semantic token created = color/modal/bg (809:2, Light base/white / Dark gray-dark/100). All modal panels (8 main variants + 2 detached + 3 Spec Dark instances) rebound to it; foundation-direct gray-dark/100 override removed. No longer a decision item.

Ex3/Ex4 usage examples were DETACHED to compose complex bodies (radios/map/table) — Figma instance limitation. Confirm acceptable for review demo, or build as separate composed frames. (Main component set unaffected — real instances.)
Ex4 data table + map are REPRESENTATIVE MOCKUPS (plan §D: map = image placeholder; table = header text + divider + empty state) not real core Table instances. Confirm sufficient or swap later.

RESOLVED (R6) — installer-wipe risk addressed by user decision: Modal moved to 'test' page (302:19291), which the installer does not rebuild. Usage + Spec Dark rebuilt there. Set/Usage/Spec now safe from installer runs. (Modal still not in installer build-components.ts — that remains a separate future task if Modal should be installer-managed.)

R7 — FOOTER BUTTON LABEL editing: cannot be exposed as a Modal component property. The local Button component (687:19532) has no label TEXT property, and its label text lives inside a nested INSTANCE — Figma does not allow binding a parent component's property across an instance boundary. Options: (a) accept current behavior — users edit a button label by double-clicking into the button on the instance (deep edit, standard Figma); (b) add a label TEXT property to the core Button component itself (out of Modal scope; affects all Button usages) then optionally re-expose on Modal. Recommend (a) unless the team wants Button to have a first-class label property.

R7 — Title/Body property editing from THIS runtime is font-blocked (setProperties TEXT requires Pretendard, not installed in MCP). This does NOT affect users in Figma Desktop (Pretendard installed) — the properties are correctly created & bound and are fully editable there. Same Pretendard-runtime limitation as item1.
